entries.translation: Тому было всего двадцать пять, когда он заработал свой первый миллион.

entries.word: Tom isn't at all selfish.

entries.word: Tom fed the horse.

entries.word: Did you see Mary's reaction when she saw the spider?

entries.word: Tom has never milked a cow.

entries.word: We have the right to bear arms.

entries.word: He loves to fish.
